mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cdc_article_image WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY position, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cdc_article_image (article_id, image_key, file_path, caption, position, generated_by, generation_prompt, width, height, file_size, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{imageKey}, #{filePath}, #{caption}, #{position}, #{generatedBy}, #{generationPrompt}, #{width}, #{height}, #{fileSize}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cdc_article_image SET image_key = #{imageKey}, file_path = #{filePath}, caption = #{caption}, position = #{position}, generated_by = #{generatedBy}, generation_prompt = #{generationPrompt}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, file_size = #{fileSize}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cdc_article_image SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cdc_article_image SET status = 0 WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
